description: A film production company applies for a permit to film on a city street, requiring temporary road closures.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a new 'Film Permit' application from the queue.
Review the requested street closures and filming times.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the impact of the request.

nodes.task_description: Automatically notify the police, fire, and transportation departments to review and approve the request.

expected_outcome.value: Agent forwards the application to all relevant departments for their sign-off.
